reasoning_content:
Let me now check the Asg2Json to see how parameter names are handled - the problem is that the FunctionDecl already has params (VarDecls) and the Type also has params (from FunctionType). The issue is that the param names from the type-level declaration need to get propagated to the FunctionDecl level.

Let me check Asg2Json.hpp to see how FuncDecl params are output.
